text:
Created attachment 256638
Screenshot: PSK not applicable in wpa_gui

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=wpa_passphrase&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-release#NAME> is: 

> … for generating a 256-bit pre-shared WPA key …

With my (currently working) configuration for eduroam: 

- a PSK is not applicable in wpa_gui(8). 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=wpa_gui&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports>
<https://www.freshports.org/net/wpa_supplicant_gui/>
